mapper.sql: USER_ID, USERNAME, PASSWORD_HASH, NICK_NAME, USER_STATUS, IS_DELETE, IS_ALLOW_ROLE_CHANGE, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_USER (USERNAME, PASSWORD_HASH, NICK_NAME, USER_STATUS, IS_DELETE, IS_ALLOW_ROLE_CHANGE, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickName}, #{userStatus}, #{isDelete}, #{isAllowRoleChange}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM SYS_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM SYS_USER WHERE USERNAME = #{username} LIMIT 1
